name: Electrode Beast Cation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カチオン
desc: If this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "Electrode Beast Anion" from your Deck or GY to your hand, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Normal Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Thunder monster, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except LIGHT Xyz Monsters. You can target 1 other Thunder monster you control that has a Level; this card's Level becomes that monster's until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Electrode Beast Cation" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "Electrode Beast Anion" from your Deck or GY to your hand, then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Normal Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Thunder monster, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except LIGHT Xyz Monsters. You can target 1 other Thunder monster you control that has a Level; this card's Level becomes that monster's until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Electrode Beast Cation" once per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
